calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2025 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
Off Calendar Jun-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A,'s motion for summary judgment is granted. Wells Fargo has submitted sufficient evidence to satisfy its summary motion burden that it is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Weilong Cao in the amount of $9,319.93 plus costs of $775. No opposition filed. The court will sign the previously submitted proposed order and proposed judgment.

Order and Judgment is Signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
